message:
feat: Pin Frankentui git deps, add PolicyEngine telemetry snapshot, and daemon bridge proptests

Consolidates Frankentui sibling path dependencies to pinned git sources,
completing the rch worker topology fix alongside the earlier FrankenRedis
migration (ft-3681t.7.3.1.2).

Dependency migration:
- Replace 7 Frankentui path deps (../../../frankentui/crates/ftui-*) with
  pinned git source at rev 18facd3f for deterministic remote builds
- Extend .cargo/config.toml.example with Frankentui patch block (ftui-core,
  ftui-render, ftui-layout, ftui-style, ftui-widgets, ftui-runtime,
  ftui-backend) for local sibling checkout development convenience
- Update Cargo.lock with consolidated git-source resolution, removing
  duplicate path-based entries

Telemetry infrastructure:
- Add PolicyEngineTelemetrySnapshot struct aggregating snapshots from 14
  subsystems (decision log, quarantine, audit chain, compliance, credential
  broker, connector governor/registry/reliability, bundles, mesh, ingestion,
  namespace, approvals, revocations)
- Add PolicyEngine::telemetry_snapshot() method for unified capture, enabling
  ft doctor --json and fleet dashboard feeds

Tests:
- Add proptest_daemon_bridge.rs with property-based tests for 8 daemon
  bridge serde types (EmbedPriority, DaemonBridgeConfig, DaemonBridgeMetrics,
  SingleEmbedEntry, BatchEmbedRequest, SingleEmbedResult, BatchEmbedResult,
  DaemonBridgeExplanation) plus behavioral invariants for priority mapping,
  config identity, metric bounds, and degradation classification

Closes ft-3681t.7.3.1.2, ft-3681t.7.3.1.3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
